on.text: Okay, the user is asking for the sum of 17 and 26. Let me check that. 17 plus 26. Hmm, 17 plus 20 is 37, and then adding 6 more makes it 43. Wait, no, wait. Wait, 17 plus 26. The user wants just the number, so I'll make sure to reply with 43 without any extra text.
